All-in-one ecommerce marketing platform: All-in-one ecommerce marketing platform for email, SMS, and push notification campaigns with powerful automation and segmentation.
To obtain your Omnisend API key:\n1. Log:
To obtain your Omnisend API key:
1. Log in to your Omnisend account
2. Go to **Store settings → Integrations & API → API Keys**
3. Click **Create API Key**, give it a name
4. Copy the generated key and paste it here
Create a new contact or update an existi: Create a new contact or update an existing contact in Omnisend. If a contact with the same email already exists, it will be updated.
Retrieve a contact by their Omnisend con: Retrieve a contact by their Omnisend contact ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of contacts fr: Retrieve a paginated list of contacts from Omnisend.
Send a customer event to Omnisend. Event: Send a customer event to Omnisend. Events track customer behavior and trigger automations (e.g. welcome emails, abandoned cart reminders). Use predefined events or create custom ones.
Retrieve a list of email campaigns from: Retrieve a list of email campaigns from Omnisend.
The subscription status for the email ch: The subscription status for the email channel.
Tags to assign to the contact.
Send a welcome email to the contact upon: Send a welcome email to the contact upon creation.
Custom key-value properties to store on: Custom key-value properties to store on the contact (e.g. {"shoeSize": 42, "plan": "premium"}).
Number of contacts to skip for paginatio: Number of contacts to skip for pagination.
Email address of the contact to send the: Email address of the contact to send the event for.
The name of the event. Use predefined na: The name of the event. Use predefined names (e.g. "added product to cart", "placed order") or a custom event name.
Custom key-value fields to include with: Custom key-value fields to include with the event (e.g. {"orderId": "12345", "totalPrice": 99.99}).
Number of campaigns to skip for paginati: Number of campaigns to skip for pagination.
